# Experts in Africa
With over 100 years of collective professional experience, South Suez offers a unique, diversified investment platform that provides access to African primary, secondary and co-investment markets. A flexible approach to investing, teamwork and information-sharing across these strategies is critical in ensuring sustainable investment success.
* ![South Suez](https://www.southsuez.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/01/HOME-PAGE_Primary-Investments-icon-95x95.png)
* ### Primary Investments
* We offer investors access to high quality, differentiated private equity opportunities, whilst giving our GPs a long term partner of reference to provide capital and strategic guidance.
* [Learn More](https://www.southsuez.com/expertise/primary-investments/)
* ![South Suez](https://www.southsuez.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/01/HOME-PAGE_Secondary-Investments-icon-95x95.png)
* ### Secondary Investments
* We consider ourselves one of the leaders in the African secondaries market, which has in turn given us unprecedented access to dealflow our investors would not otherwise see.
* [Learn More](https://www.southsuez.com/expertise/secondary-investments/)
* ![South Suez](https://www.southsuez.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/01/HOME-PAGE_Co-Investments-icon-95x95.png)
* ### Co-Investments
* Investors will enjoy efficient direct exposure to a truly diversified pool of attractive deals backed by strong general partner sponsors.
* [Learn More](https://www.southsuez.com/expertise/co-investments/)
* ![South Suez](https://www.southsuez.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/01/HOME-PAGE_Managed-Solutions-icon-95x95.png)
* ### Managed Solutions
* We provide separate managed accounts for our clients who are interested in a more flexible portfolio construction.
* [Learn More](https://www.southsuez.com/expertise/managed-solutions/)

## Our Portfolio
Through its Primary, Secondary and Directs allocations, South Suez has built a diversified portfolio of companies operating across over 40 countries in Africa
To view a sample of our African investments by country, please click below.
[View Here ](https://www.southsuez.com/about/our-portfolio/)

### AVCA interviews Matthew Hunt on African Private Equity
Matthew Hunt discusses the process of evaluating African Private equity managers at the 13th annual AVCA conference in Addis Ababa, Ethiopia.
[Read more](https://www.southsuez.com/avca-interviews-matthew-hunt-on-african-private-equity/)
![South Suez Capital](https://www.southsuez.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/05/07-Catherine-1451-2-f1-767x900.jpg)
### AVCA Interview Catherine Swanepoel on African Currencies
Catherine Swanepoel discusses the impact of African currencies on the valuations on African private equity and how to mitigate these risks through portfolio selection and diversification.
[Read more](https://www.southsuez.com/avca-interview-catherine-swanepoel-on-african-currencies/)
![South Suez Capital](https://www.southsuez.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/Deepack-1932-f12098-767x900.jpg)
### CNBCAfrica interviews Deepak Malik
Deepak Malik on why European lenders are putting together a multi-million Dollar fund to invest in Africa and the impact this will have.
[Read more](https://www.southsuez.com/cnbcafrica-interviews-deepak-malik/)
